form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.3 lengths at this track over 300m (17.53) beating Gunnell Girl in Grade 5 on April 11. Should be prominent.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 300m in 17.91. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 300m at this track at Grade 5 level. Forgive the latest run. Has solid claims on her best form.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.99) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 10 lengths. Has two successes and six minors from 13 starts from box 3. Among the chances on best.
